features.featureTitle: Add a protected Admin page (route: /admin) accessible from the navigation (or a direct URL). The page must include a product management interface with: a table/list of all existing products showing name, category, price, stock, and featured status; an 'Add Product' form/modal with fields for name, category, description, price, imageUrl, stock quantity, and featured flag; an 'Edit' action per product that pre-fills the form with existing values; and a 'Delete' action per product with a confirmation prompt.
